title: Frozen
description: Magic is but a bubble bath away. Let it go and blast the bath with spearmint bubbles and cleansing sea salt for a gently invigorating soak. Soak under a fantastical dream come to life.

images.alt: Frozen. A reusable bubble bar comprised of a wooden stick handle and a typical, five-pointed star-shaped, blue bubble bar on top. There is a snowflake shape embossed on the star and a visible silver shimmer throughout the product.
The image shows a close-up shot of the Frozen reusable bubble bar stick being held under running tap water. The icy-blue star at the end creates bubbly, cool-blue water below.
The image shows a close-up shot of the Frozen reusable bubble bar stick being held under running tap water. The icy-blue star at the end creates bubbly, cool-blue water below.
The image shows a close-up shot of the Frozen reusable bubble bar stick being swirled around cool, icy-blue bath water surrounded by a thick blanket of foamy bubbles made by the product.
The image shows the colourful aftermath of using the Frozen reusable bubble bark stick. There is turquoise, icy-blue bath water surrounded by mountains of bright bubbles.

collections: Bath Bombs and Bubble Bars for Kids
